shopping_245.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to add the item to the cart because it did not select a color and size for the product, which were indicated as required fields.
shopping_245.REFLECTION: Always check for and select all required product options (e.g., color, size) before attempting to add an item to the cart. Look for explicit messages like "This is a required field" to identify mandatory selections.

POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent failed to add the item to the cart because it did not select a color and size for the product, which were indicated as required fields.
